title: eulophia micrantha
intro: Eulophia micrantha, also known as the small-flowered grass orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia micrantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine in various parts of Africa.
